artPrompt: A capped landfill turned hilltop park rises in the wide frame: scrubby seeded grass over swollen mounds, a lone bent vent pipe exhaling faint sickly-green vapor, drifting litter snagged in dead weeds under a bruised stormy sky. No figure, only the humming ground. A single shaft of cold storm-light breaks the gloom, rust-red soil bleeding through below, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Old Landfill
text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}. Activate this ability only if a creature you control has a sludge counter on it.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice The Old Landfill: It deals 2 damage to any target. Decades of buried whatever, all at once.
flavorText: Capped, seeded, and turned into a park. The park hums. The geese left.
